[FIGURE: Circular arrangement showing Savitri at top, with Giridhar and Ram on sides, Chandra and Sushma below them, and Mahima, Shalini, and Ravi at bottom]

(a) According to the question, following new arrangement is obtained.

[FIGURE: 3x3 grid arrangement with W, Y, P in top row, V in middle left, Q in middle right, T, S, R in bottom row]

Clearly, none of the persons except P remains at the same position.
(c) Clearly, R is second to the left of Y.
(d) Clearly, Y is fourth to the left of V.
(e) Clearly, Q is to the immediate right of R.
(b) Except W, all are facing inside.
(d) Clearly, Y is third to the right of W.
(b) Only one person Y is sitting between T and Q.
(a) A and F are not neighbours.
(b) Both E and C are two places apart from D.
(c) B, C and F are given in correct order.
(c) The other neighbour of A is E.
(d) F is placed opposite to E.
